vulnerabilities.title: Malicious Package in electron-native-notify
vulnerabilities.description:
All versions of `electron-native-notify` contain malicious code. The package was part of a targeted attack to steal cryptocurrency wallet seeds and upload them to a remote server, effectively giving attackers access to users wallets.


## Recommendation

Remove the package from your environment and [follow the recommendations by Komodo](https://komodoplatform.com/vulnerability-discovered-in-komodos-agama-wallet-this-is-what-you-need-to-do/)
